title: Fix multi-arch image build version-tag + allow testing in PRs

comments.body: **Note**:  There is an option to hide the 'gray' (manual) tasks from view in github.  This could perhaps dissuade casual PR authors from pressing that, nice, juicy, yummy, curious-looking 'trigger' button.  In the case of the 'stable' build task, pressing that button will result in an hour-and-a-half wait :open_mouth: Let me know if this would be desirable (it's a one-line addition).

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
